name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance Anaheim, California — US Cash Advance connects Detroit borrowers with third-party lenders for payday loans and cash advances up to $1,00...
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical retail location at 20002 Schoolcraft Rd, Detroit, MI 48223, with a corporate address in Charlotte, NC. The company functions as a loan marketplace or lead generation intermediary, connecting consumers to third-party lenders rather than issuing loans directly. It serves borrowers of all credit backgrounds, positioning itself as an accessible option for people who have been turned down elsewhere due to poor credit history.

The company's core products are payday loans and cash advances, both capped at $1,000 or less, alongside same-day loans and bad credit loans advertised up to $50,000. Additional services listed include debt consolidation, personal loans for bad credit, and loans without a credit check. The process follows a marketplace model: the customer fills out an online inquiry form, gets matched with a third-party lender, reviews the loan offer, signs the contract, and receives funds — with no direct underwriting performed by US Cash Advance itself.

What distinguishes this location is its unusually broad operating hours: Monday through Friday 8am to 9pm and weekends 10am to 7pm, making it far more accessible than a bank branch. The Detroit storefront offers in-person service, and multiple customer reviews specifically name a staff member (Doris) for patient, pressure-free assistance and clear explanation of repayment terms. Customer ratings average 4.4 stars, with reviewers citing approvals completed in under 45 minutes and same-day cash disbursement.

US Cash Advance is a lead generator, not a direct lender — a critical distinction. Borrowers are connected to unnamed third-party lenders, and APR ranges, fee schedules, and lender identities are not disclosed on the website. This limits cost transparency until after a customer submits personal information and receives an offer. The contact email on the Detroit page uses a development-server domain (kinsta.cloud) rather than a branded address, which is unusual for a live commercial location. As with all payday and cash advance products, the cost of borrowing is typically high, and the company's own disclosure notes all loans are subject to standard underwriting review before approval.
address: 254 N Anaheim Blvd a1, Anaheim, CA 92805

company_info.headquarters: 254 N Anaheim Blvd a1, Anaheim, CA 92805

pros: Extended hours — Mon-Fri 8am to 9pm and weekends 10am to 7pm, far beyond typical bank hours
In-person service available at Detroit storefront for borrowers who prefer face-to-face assistance
All credit types accepted, explicitly including bad credit
Customer reviews cite full approvals completed in under 45 minutes in-store
Same-day funding available for qualifying borrowers
No collateral required — all loans are unsecured
4.4-star customer rating with specific praise for staff transparency on repayment terms
cons: Acts as a lead generator, not a direct lender — borrowers are handed off to undisclosed third-party lenders
No APR ranges, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed anywhere on the website
The Detroit location's listed contact email uses a development/staging server domain (kinsta.cloud), not a professional business address
Bad credit loans advertised up to $50,000 are not a product US Cash Advance controls or underwrites directly
Limited waiting area noted in customer reviews — in-person experience can feel cramped during busy periods
best_for: Detroit-area residents who need small emergency cash ($100–$1,000) and prefer in-person service
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who have been declined elsewhere
People needing same-day funding outside normal banking hours
First-time short-term loan applicants who want staff guidance through the process
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best suited for Detroit-area borrowers facing an immediate short-term cash need who have poor credit and value in-person guidance or after-hours access. The main caveat is that it operates as a lead generator — customers are matched with unnamed third-party lenders, so actual rates and terms are unknown until after personal information is submitted.
services: Bad credit loans (up to $50,000 via third-party lenders)
Online loan inquiry and third-party lender matching
In-person loan assistance at Detroit storefront
